recalls.Description: Spectrum Brands Pet Care is recalling its FURminator deShedding Ultra Premium Conditioner sold in a one-gallon clear container. The product features a black label and is identified by UPC 854460001073. Lot numbers for affected units include 211102 for those sold without a pump and lot numbers ranging from 220402 to 240152 for units sold with a pump. Consumers should check the bottom of the container for the lot number to determine if their product is affected.
recalls.Title: Spectrum Brands Pet Care Issues Recall for FURminator deShedding Conditioner Due to Bacterial Contamination Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For further assistance, consumers can reach Spectrum Brands Pet Care at 888-837-6688 from 8 a.m. to 4:30 p.m. CT, Monday through Friday, or visit www.prodprotect.com/recall/FURminator or www.spectrumbrands.com and navigate to the 'Product Recalls' section for more details.

Products.Name: FURminator deShedding Ultra Premium Dog Conditioner (1 Gallon)
Products.NumberOfUnits: About 102,000 (In addition, about 250 were sold in Canada)

Images.Caption: Recalled FURminator deShedding Ultra Premium Dog Conditioner (1 Gallon) – Sold with and without pump

Injuries.Name: The firm has received four reports of mold developing in the container. No injuries have been reported.

Retailers.Name: Available online at Amazon.com, Chewy.com, and Petsmart.com, as well as in Petsmart stores nationwide from January 2022 through April 2024, priced around $63.

Distributors.Name: Spectrum Brands Pet LLC, of Middleton, Wisconsin

Hazards.Name: Potential bacterial contamination, including Pseudomonas aeruginosa, posing infection risks for individuals with weakened immune systems.

Remedies.Name: Consumers must stop using the recalled conditioner immediately and contact the company for a full refund. Do not dispose of the product before marking it as 'Recalled' and uploading a photo of the UPC, date, and initials, along with a picture of the disposed product online at www.prodprotect.com/recall/FURminator. A refund will be issued upon successful registration.

recalls.metaDescription: Spectrum Brands recalls FURminator deShedding Conditioner due to bacterial contamination risks. Check your product and get a refund.

recalls.Description: Bausch + Lomb has announced a recall of two specific lots of Project Watson Eyelid Wipes for Dogs, which are packaged in small round containers with a twist-on lid featuring blue and white labeling. The affected lot numbers, A09050 and A10055, can be found on the bottom of the containers. These wipes may pose a health risk due to potential contamination by bacteria and fungi, which can lead to serious infections, particularly in individuals with compromised immune systems or open wounds.
recalls.Title: Bausch + Lomb Issues Recall for Project Watson Eyelid Wipes for Dogs Due to Bacterial and Fungal Contamination Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For further assistance, consumers can contact Project Watson at 877-857-1149 from 8:30 a.m. to 5 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, or visit http://eyelidwiperecall.com/ or www.tryprojectwatson.com/ and click on 'Recall Notice' for more details.

Products.Name: Project Watson Eyelid Wipes for Dogs

Images.Caption: Recalled Project Watson Eyelid Wipes for Dogs (45 count)

Injuries.Name: The company has received seven reports of a substance developing in the container after the product had been opened and in use. No illness of consumers or pets has been reported.

Retailers.Name: Available at PetSmart, Walmart, and various other retailers nationwide, as well as online at Chewy.com and Amazon.com from February 2023 through March 2024, priced between $13 and $15.

Distributors.Name: Bausch & Lomb Americas Inc., of Bridgewater, New Jersey

Hazards.Name: Risk of bacterial and fungal contamination leading to serious infections

Remedies.Name: Stop using the wipes and request a full refund by submitting a photo of the product via the online form at http://eyelidwiperecall.com/. Refunds will be issued by check through U.S. mail. Dispose of the product in household trash.

recalls.metaDescription: Bausch + Lomb recalls Project Watson Eyelid Wipes for Dogs due to contamination risks. Learn how to get a refund and stay safe.
